title: epacris delicatissima
intro: Epacris delicatissima, also known as the delicate epacris or native rosemary, is a flowering plant native to the eastern coast of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epacris delicatissima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Epacris delicatissima include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
